case_title: THE DIRECTOR OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS AS VS. HUNG Q NGUY

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE DIRECTOR OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS AS ADMINISTRATOR OF THE UNINSURED EMPLOYERS FUND, STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT NGUY, HUNG Q AN INDIVIDUAL DBA N AND S AUTO BODY SHOP JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE DIRECTOR OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS AS ADMINISTRATOR OF THE UNINSURED EMPLOYERS FUND, STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NGUY, HUNG Q AN INDIVIDUAL DBA N AND S AUTO BODY SHOP $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,000.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
